justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified (starter limit 3 vs 5), both values precisely attributed to Bird and MJ respectively, escalation routed with clear recommendation, professional tier (20 projects) correctly noted as uncontested, no brief produced committing to either value, and AC1 flagged as dependent on resolution.

observations.text: Contradiction clearly identified with precise values: Bird's 3 vs MJ's 5
Both values properly attributed to their source agents
Escalation is well-structured with options and a recommendation referencing Bird's role as Domain Authority
Professional tier (20) correctly listed as uncontested in high_confidence_areas
AC1 explicitly called out as failing against MJ's limit of 5, correctly flagging the dependency
Low confidence of 35 appropriately reflects the unresolved contradiction
No brief produced — output is purely an escalation, avoiding committing to either incorrect value
